_comment: Harbor OP under test. Placeholders like {HARBOR_DISCOVERY_URL} are rendered by conformance/run-plan.sh. Harbor invariants asserted here: PAIRWISE subjects only (subject_type=pairwise, DESIGN §3.2) and ASYMMETRIC-ONLY signing (id_token_signed_response_alg=ES256; EdDSA also allowed; alg:none and HS* are rejected, DESIGN §7). This key is ignored by the OIDF suite.
description: Harbor hot-path OP under test — Authorization Code + PKCE (S256), pairwise subjects, asymmetric signing only (ES256/EdDSA). See conformance/README.md.
